Registry / Terms / initial intrinsic error

initial intrinsic error

—Not in VIM/VIML G 18 #00657 · 41 instances

Suggested actions

  1. HIGH No authoritative definition in VIM or VIML.
  2. MEDIUM 28 distinct definitions — harmonise.

Publication instances

27 distinct definitions across 41 publications. 7 definitions are shared by multiple publications (merge candidates).
